response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or IEC 62443 security practices required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse technologies
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring
Proven ability to build scalable, event-driven systems and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL work in the last 9 years, critical for this role
Lacks exposure to industrial protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, IEC 62443) and on-prem/cloud automation platforms
No evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) implementation or industrial cybersecurity experience
